name: migration-test-keep-old-ddl
tags: migration test DDL old schema refactor preserve integrity pragma alter table
body:
Do not refactor the DDL in tests that exist to verify the migration path.

**Why:** A migration test must use the pre-migration schema to remain meaningful. If you replace its inline DDL with the canonical (post-migration) DDL from schema.py, the test no longer exercises the migration — it starts in the already-migrated state and the migrate_*() call becomes a no-op.

**How to apply:** When updating tests to import from src/db/schema.py, skip any test that deliberately creates an old schema to test an ALTER TABLE migration. Leave those inline. A comment like `# intentional: pre-migration schema` is sufficient.
